search_query: origin of snow white dwarfs' names
combined_text: What Are the Names of Snow White's Seven Dwarfs? "Full Answer In the original ""Snow White"" fairy tale published in 1812 by the Brothers Grimm, the seven dwarfs did not have individual names. The seven dwarfs were later given the names Blick, Snick, Plick, Whick, Flick, Glick and Quee in the 1912 Broadway play ""Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs,""
